nodes.title: Aging Speed Multiplier
nodes.description: Given a SaveManager with TotalPlayTimeSeconds, when AgingManager.GetSpeedMultiplier() is called, then returns a value < 1.0 that decreases with more play time. Returns 1.0 for 0 play time.

nodes.title: Aging Apply To Party
nodes.description: Given play time has accumulated, when ApplyAgeToParty(partyList) is called, then each character receives an Age status effect with tier based on play time. Speed decreases, defense increases.

nodes.title: Aging Apply To Character
nodes.description: Given a specific aging tier, when ApplyAgeToCharacter(character, tier) is called, then an Age status effect of that tier is applied to the single character.

nodes.title: Poverty Stamina Regen
nodes.description: Given PovertyManager at various levels, when GetStaminaRegenMultiplier() is called, then returns 1.0 at level 0 and progressively lower values at higher poverty levels.

nodes.title: Poverty Kynde Gen
nodes.description: Given PovertyManager at various levels, when GetKyndeGenMultiplier() is called, then returns 1.0 at level 0 and progressively lower values at higher poverty levels.

nodes.title: Poverty Level Clamp
nodes.description: Given PovertyManager, when SetPovertyLevel() is called with values outside [0, 5], then the level is clamped: values > 5 become 5, values < 0 become 0.

nodes.title: Death Of Old Age Trigger
nodes.description: Given player is at Field of Grace and aging tier is high enough, when the condition is met, then AgingManager fires OnDeathOfOldAgeRequested and GameStateManager handles the special death sequence.

nodes.title: Green Knight Random Appear
nodes.description: Given GreenKnightWillAppearRandomly flag is true in SaveManager, then when entering certain buildings, there is a percentage chance (15% initially, 25% later) the Green Knight boss spawns.

nodes.title: Suppress Combat Hazards
nodes.description: Given SuppressCombatHazards hidden flag is true, then combat hazards from CombatHazardManager are suppressed (not applied).

nodes.title: Wode Wo Passcode
nodes.description: Given SecretCodeListener is active, when the player inputs the sequence W-O-D-E, then the Wode-Wo arc is triggered (install-permanent death mechanic).

nodes.title: Meta Progress Lifetime
nodes.description: Given MetaProgress tracking, then LifetimeRunCount persists across NewGame calls and is never reset. Each NewGame increments the count.

nodes.title: Multi Run Scaling
nodes.description: Given LifetimeRunCount has accumulated over 15+ runs, then crit chance, damage taken, Kynde gain, and other parameters scale according to the multi-run progression table.
